channel.title: Elasticsearch on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Elasticsearch on TLDRBins

item.title: elasticsearch
item.description: Basic Commands # List indexes curl -s http://10.10.11.10:9200/_cat/indices?v # Dump data with index name (e.g. index_name) curl -s -X GET "http://10.10.11.10:9200/index_name/_search?size=100" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d' { "query": { "match_all": {} } } ' | jq .
